images.label: An ancient stone altar in a quiet hill-country setting
images.prompt_used: Create a respectful symbolic scene of an ancient stone altar at Bethel, with a quiet sacred atmosphere, warm light, hill country setting, premium semi-realistic painterly Bible learning app style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Ancient stone altar in a quiet hill-country setting

images.label: Small foreign objects being buried under a tree
images.prompt_used: Create a symbolic scene of small household idols or foreign objects being buried under a tree, handled respectfully and not sensationally, ancient setting, premium semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Small foreign objects being buried under a tree in an ancient setting

images.label: A simple burial marker beside an ancient road
images.prompt_used: Create a respectful symbolic scene of a simple burial marker beside an ancient road near distant hills, representing Rachel's burial on the way to Ephrath/Bethlehem. Quiet, reverent atmosphere, premium semi-realistic painterly style, square or near-square composition, no text, no logos.
images.alt: Simple burial marker beside an ancient road near distant hills

images.label: A rugged hill-country landscape with distant tents
